title: Elangaathu Veesudhey Lyrics Pithamagan
stanzas:
elangaathu veesudhey
isai pola paesudhey
valaiyaadha moongilil
raagam valanju oadudhey
megam mulichu kaetkudhey

karum paarai manasula
mayil thoagai virikkudhey
mazha chaaral thelikkudhey
pul veli paadhai virikkudhey
vaanavil kudaiyum pudikkudhey

maniyin oasai kaettu
mana kadhavu thirakkudhey
puthiya thaalam pottu
udal kaatril midhakkudhey

elangaathu veesudhey
isai pola paesudhey
valaiyaadha moongilil
raagam valanju oadudhey
megam mulichu kaetkudhey

pinni pinni chinna elaiyodum
nenjai allum vanna thuni pola
onnukkonnu dhaan enanji irukku
uravu yellaam amanji irukku

alli alli thandhu uravaadum
annamadi indha nelam pola
silarukkuthaan manasu irukku
ulagam adhil nilaichu irukku

nethu, thanimaiyila pochu
yaarum thunai illai.
yaaro vazhi thunaikku vandhaal
yaedhum inai illai

ulagathil edhuvum
thanichu illaiyae
kuzhalil raagam
malaril vaasam
serndhadhu pola

elangaathu veesudhey
isai pola paesudhey
valaiyaadha moongilil
raagam valanju oadudhey
megam mulichu kaetkudhey

manasula enna aagaayam
dhinam dhinam adhu pudhir podum
ragasiyatha yaaru arinja?
adhisayatha  yaaru purinja?

vedha vidhaikkira kai dhaanae
malar parikkudhu dhinam dhorum
malar thodukka naaru eduthu
yaar thodutha maalaiyaachu

aalam vizhudhilae
oonjal aadum kili yellaam
moodum siragilae mella
pesum kadhaiyellaam
thaalaattu kaettidaamalae
thaayin madiya thaedi oadum
mala nadhi pola.......

karum paarai manasula
mayil thoagai virikkudhey
mazha chaaral thelikkudhey
pul veli paadhai virikkudhey
vaanavil kudaiyum pudikkudhey

maniyin oasai kaettu
mana kadhavu thirakkudhey
puthiya thaalam pottu
udal kaatril midhakkudhey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Elangaathu Veesudhey?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, using nature as a metaphor for emotions.

In which movie is the song Elangaathu Veesudhey featured?

The song is featured in the movie Pithamagan.

Who is the singer of Elangaathu Veesudhey?

The song is sung by Sriram Parthasarathy.

Who composed the music for Elangaathu Veesudhey?

The music for the song was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was Elangaathu Veesudhey released?

The song was released on October 24, 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Elangaathu Veesudhey, the protagonist expresses deep emotions of love and yearning, beautifully encapsulated through poetic lyrics and a soothing melody. The song plays a pivotal role in Pithamagan, enhancing the romantic atmosphere of the film. With its enchanting composition by Ilaiyaraaja and heartfelt rendition by Sriram Parthasarathy, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This melody is perfect for moments of reflection and connection, making it a timeless piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Elangaathu Veesudhey from Pithamagan is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of romance and longing. With Sriram Parthasarathy's soulful vocals and Ilaiyaraaja's enchanting composition, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of this beautiful collaboration that brings forth emotions like never before.
stanzaMeanings: The breeze flows like music, speaking softly, the melody dances in the bamboo, the clouds burst and listen.
In the heart of the dark valley, the peacock spreads its feathers, the rain's fragrance is revealed, the path outside blooms, and the rainbow is embraced.
Listening to the sound of the gem, the mind opens the door, a new rhythm is set, and the body sways in the breeze.
The breeze flows like music, speaking softly, the melody dances in the bamboo, the clouds burst and listen.
Sister, sister, with the small leaf, my heart is like a colorful cloth, it is tied to you, all relationships are tied together.
Some have a heart like this earth, the world is like a moon shining in it.
Yesterday, loneliness came, there is no one to support. If someone comes to help, there is no connection at all.
Nothing in the world is alone, like the melody in the flute, it has merged with the flower's fragrance.
The breeze flows like music, speaking softly, the melody dances in the bamboo, the clouds burst and listen.
What is the sky in the mind? Every day it brings new secrets, who knows them? Who understands the wonders?
The hand that creates the Vedas is like a flower, every day it blooms, who picked the flower from the river?
In the world of dreams, the swinging parrot is all quiet, every story softly sings, like a river searching for its mother.
In the heart of the dark valley, the peacock spreads its feathers, the rain's fragrance is revealed, the path outside blooms, and the rainbow is embraced.
Listening to the sound of the gem, the mind opens the door, a new rhythm is set, and the body sways in the breeze.
